title: Sow a small batch of lettuce
description: For a steady salad supply, sow a small amount rather than one large planting. Repeat every 2–3 weeks while conditions are mild.

title: Resow radish for quick harvests
description: Radish is fast. Sow small rows every 2 weeks so harvests do not all arrive at once.

title: Resow coriander before it bolts
description: Coriander can run to seed quickly. Sow small batches regularly and use partial shade in warmer periods.

title: Sow another small batch of spinach
description: Spinach is best succession sown in cooler conditions. Sow small amounts regularly and avoid hot exposed spots.

title: Sow a follow-up batch of dwarf beans
description: During warm settled weather, sow a small follow-up batch for a longer harvest window.

title: Sow spring onions in small batches
description: Sow small batches of spring onions for regular pulling rather than one large harvest.
